allow:
Bash(grep -rn --include="*.{jsx,js,css,ts,tsx}" \\
  -e "#EDEBE8" -e "#F5F3F0" -e "#E3E0DC" -e "#D5D0CA" -e "#F5EDE8" \\
  -e "#2D2A26" -e "#5C5752" -e "#9A9490" -e "#B8B2AA" -e "#6B6560" \\
  -e "#E44D2E" -e "#F0705A" -e "#C93D22" \\
  -e "#DC2626" -e "Bebas Neue" -e "DM Sans" -e "Anton" -e "Outfit" \\
  src/ --exclude-dir=node_modules \\
  | grep -v "\\.css:" | sed 's/.*\\/src\\//src\\//' | sort)
Bash(ls node_modules/.bin/vite 2>/dev/null || echo "not found, installing" && npm install --silent 2>&1 | tail -5)
